scenarios.description: clone() on a document with custom Parser settings yields a deep copy of parser without affecting original
scenarios.precondition: Document with parser set to non-default HTML parser configured (e.g. xml parser settings)
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned.parser().settings() equals original.parser().settings() but is a distinct instance; modifying clone.parser() does not alter original.parser()
pseudocode: TEST TC03 clone preserves and isolates custom parser
// modify cloned parser and assert no effect on original

scenarios.description: clone() on a document with modified OutputSettings (escapeMode and charset) yields isolated copy retaining settings
scenarios.precondition: Document with outputSettings modified: escapeMode=extended, charset=ISO-8859-1
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned.outputSettings().escapeMode() and charset() match original but are distinct; changes on clone do not affect original
pseudocode: TEST TC04 clone preserves and isolates custom outputSettings
// modify clone and assert original unchanged

scenarios.description: clone() on a document with nested child elements yields a deep copy of childNodes that can be altered independently
scenarios.precondition: Document with additional nested elements and attributes under body
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned.childNodes() size equals original; modifying a child in clone does not affect original
pseudocode: TEST TC05 clone deep-copies child nodes
// modify cloned div and assert original unaffected
